description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Dinit on debian-bullseye-i386 CI that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, and on workflow dispatch. Use a single ubuntu-latest job with a debian:bullseye container that checks out the repository, adds 32-bit repositories, installs 32-bit dependencies, prints the g++ architecture, builds the project with make, checks the architecture of the dinit executive file, runs unit tests with make check, and runs integration tests with make check-igr.
